column1: # - Columns represent sprint/week numbers. Sprint 0 = Week 1 (setup). Sprint 1 = Weeks 2-3. Each sprint = 2 weeks. Total template covers ~15 weeks (7 sprints).
# - Numbers in cells = estimated HOURS for that task in that week (not days
# - Blank cells = no work allocated in that week for that task.
# - Phases: Refactor Phase (Sprints 0-5) -> Integration Phase (Sprint 6) -> Test Phase (Sprints 7-9) -> Production Cutover (Sprint 10) -> Burn-in & Knowledge Transfer (Sprints 11-14).
# - CDRL Documents: hours shown are estimated effort to produce each required deliverable.
# - Role totals at the bottom show total hours per role across all 15 weeks. Reference total = ~896 hours (Engineer + DevOps + PM).
# - MILESTONES are marked with * and have no hours — they are date markers only.
